# scraper_runs

Execution log for scraper producer, processor, and dead-letter jobs.

## Columns

| Column | Type | Required | Key | Default | Relation | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `bigint` | yes | PK |  |  | Internal scraper run row identifier. | `1000` |
| `source` | `text` | yes |  |  |  | Scraper source or subsystem that ran. | `autmog` |
| `job_type` | `text` | yes |  |  |  | Kind of scraper job that ran. | `producer` |
| `status` | `text` | yes |  |  |  | Current lifecycle state for the run. | `completed` |
| `started_at` | `timestamp with time zone` | yes |  | `now()` |  | Timestamp when the run started. | `2026-07-17T20:45:00.000Z` |
| `finished_at` | `timestamp with time zone` | no |  |  |  | Timestamp when the run finished. | `2026-07-17T20:45:42.000Z` |
| `heartbeat_at` | `timestamp with time zone` | no |  |  |  | Timestamp of the latest run heartbeat, when present. | `2026-07-17T20:45:20.000Z` |
| `error_message` | `text` | no |  |  |  | Failure summary captured for failed runs. | `Run marked failed after exceeding stale lock threshold.` |
| `stats` | `jsonb` | yes |  | `'{}'::jsonb` |  | Structured counters emitted by the scraper job. | `{"enqueuedItemJobs":142,"fetchedCount":141}` |
